name: panefleet
description: Safety-first control room for tmux-based AI coding agents and allowlisted developer services.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/ui-state.js && node --check scripts/privacy-check.mjs && node --check scripts/capture-readme-screenshots.mjs && npm run test:coverage
scripts.verify:public: npm run check && npm run privacy:check
